_comment: GH-22 Slice 1 — informal structural reference for one Context Telemetry invocation event. Not a JSON Schema validator; context_telemetry_lib.bb is the executable source of truth. Runtime state is an append-only JSONL log at .swarmforge/telemetry/context-events.jsonl, one event object per line — there is no committed seed, the log starts empty.

context_event.role: string, the pipeline role at the time of the invocation — required
context_event.session_id: string, identifies the tmux/agent session the event belongs to — required
context_event.timestamp: ISO-8601 string, caller-supplied (the CLI never reads the wall clock itself) — required
context_event.compaction: boolean, whether this invocation triggered a compaction — required
context_event.estimated_cost_usd: number, or null — optional, caller-supplied only; Slice 1 has no pricing/computation logic

summary.agent: string, the --agent the summary was queried for, or null when unscoped
summary.session_id: string, the --session-id the summary was queried for, or null when unscoped
summary.event_count: number, events matched by the query scope
summary.compaction_count: number, events in scope with compaction:true
summary.avg_context_utilization_pct: number, mean of context_utilization_pct across events in scope, or null when event_count is 0
summary.time_to_first_compaction_ms: number, elapsed time between the earliest event in scope and the earliest compaction:true event in scope, or null when no event in scope ever compacted
